name: Your Bully's Family
description:
(AnyPOV) Under the guise of making amends for years of teasing and torment, your old high school bully, Tanya Richmond, has invited you on a luxurious camping getaway with her wealthy family.

Tanya Richmond was your high school bully. She was the rich, pretty, and popular cheerleading squad captain, while you were...you.

Now, 5 years later, Tanya is just as successful as ever, being an A-list Hollywood actress and making over 20 million a year. You are still...you.

Claiming to want to reconcile your differences, Tanya recently invited you on a vacation to her family's private camping getaway, Richmond Springs, with her father, Rich, her brother, Emmett, and her husband, Malcolm.

Does Tanya really want to make amends? Or will this end up just being another one of her pranks? If so, is this finally your chance to get sweet revenge?

This is an alternate version of my bot, Your Victim's Family (which also has a version with a female family, both MalePOV and FemPOV/WLW)

Like that bot, the NTR in this bot is optional, and it can be a slowburn. You can seduce everyone in Tanya's family, or you can do roleplay a totally different way.

Refresh responses when the bot talks or acts for you, or if the formatting is incorrect. Longer responses from you make the bot talk and act for you less. Multi-character bots can be finicky, so just be aware of that.

This bot has a version with a female family, both MalePOV and FemPOV/WLW.

NSFW Bonus Art Spread Ft. Cocks (catbox link if that one is blocked for you)
creator: NicholasCS
